snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.user.list(
    limit=1,
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.user.list(
        limit=1,
    )


asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(

)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.user.head()


asyncio.run(main())
